title: Suspicious Login Activity
description: A student account shows unexpected logins from unfamiliar locations. Reconstruct the browser timeline to identify when and how the sessions occurred.

events.explanation: The user began by searching for the official university login page, establishing intent to access the portal.

events.description: Visited https://portal.westfield-uni.ac.uk/login (title: Student Portal – Sign In)
events.explanation: The search result led directly to the university authentication page.

events.description: Cookie set: PHPSESSID on portal.westfield-uni.ac.uk (expires session)
events.explanation: A session cookie was issued after the login page loaded, indicating an active browser session with the portal.
Successful authentication redirected the browser to the student dashboard.

events.description: Google search: "westfield university password reset forgot"
events.explanation: Hours later, a password reset search suggests either account compromise or an unauthorised party attempting credential recovery.
The attacker navigated to the self-service password reset flow, a common step after gaining partial account access.
A persistent authentication token was written, confirming the password reset or re-login completed successfully.
